name: @futarchy-interface/replay-harness-ui
description: UI-side scaffold of the Forked Replay Harness (Playwright + wallet stub). See PROGRESS.md.

scripts.phase-status: node -e "console.log('Forked Replay Harness — Phase 4 (synthetic wallet). See auto-qa/harness/PROGRESS.md');"
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/smoke-architecture-sync.test.mjs tests/smoke-eth-call-inspector.test.mjs tests/smoke-fork-state.test.mjs tests/smoke-invariants-catalog.test.mjs tests/smoke-market-page-fixture.test.mjs tests/smoke-scenarios-by-route.test.mjs tests/smoke-scenarios-catalog.test.mjs tests/smoke-scenarios-chaos-matrix.test.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:fork
scripts.replay: echo 'TODO Phase 5 — full chain↔api↔ui replay' && exit 1
